# Rule: imsi
# Category: telecom
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Preserves the first 5 (MCC+MNC) and last 4 digits of a 15-digit IMSI;
# other inputs fail closed. Example: 310260123456789 →
# 31026******6789.
